analysis_commentary: Window 3600s→5400s (60→90min) completed cleanly (timer_expired). Trajectory metrics IMPROVED vs 60m baseline: pEnt min 5.98 (vs 5.23), gNorm max 105.7 (vs 217.4), no full-collapse signals tripped (top1_legal_ever_positive=true, pEnt never below 5.0). 15 arenas (vs 11), 0 promoted. Mid/last candidate probes show training-mode max_prob=1.0 like 60m end-probe but inference arenas all at parity (mean 0.51). Binary-search midpoint succeeds.
